properties.name: Epoch 2 · Military radar path
properties.desc: Primary (military) radar track: the turnback at IGARI, recrossing the Malay peninsula near Kota Bharu, passing south of Penang, then northwest up the Strait of Malacca to the last fix 10 NM past waypoint MEKAR at 18:22:12 UTC. Recorded but lower precision; no transponder was operating.

citation.label: Malaysian SIR (2018); ATSB Definition of Underwater Search Areas

points.label: Start of primary-radar-only epoch (same point as last secondary return)
Brief continuation toward BITOD; apex of right turn before turnback (FI: turn back began between IGARI and BITOD)
Left turn through north - turnback hook
Established southwest-bound (~231-240°) back toward the Malay peninsula
Military radar: 35,700 ft on 231° magnetic heading (17:30:35-17:35)
points.source: time/alt/hdg: Wikipedia MH370 article (from official reports); position interpolated

points.label: Crossing coast north of Kota Bharu (near waypoint GOLUD 6.285N 102.2775E / WMKC)
points.source: time: FI p7 via Gilbert PDF (mh370search gives 17:36:43); position interpolated on coast north of Kota Bharu, anchored by OpenNav GOLUD and OurAirports WMKC

points.label: Crossing the Malay peninsula toward Penang
6 NM south of Penang Island (track aligned toward KENDI, SW of Penang)
points.source: time/description: FI p7 via Gilbert PDF; position interpolated 6 NM south of Penang Island south coast (island position from OurAirports WMKP)

points.label: Right turn onto ~290° up the Strait of Malacca
Passing Pulau Perak (island at 5°40'50"N 98°56'27"E)
points.source: time: Wikipedia MH370 article (from FI); position: Wikipedia Pulau Perak island coordinates (aircraft passed near the island)

points.label: Strait of Malacca, toward airway N571 at VAMPI
Passing waypoint VAMPI on N571
points.source: time: FI p7 via Gilbert PDF; position: OpenNav VAMPI (6°10'56"N 97°35'08"E)

points.label: Along N571 VAMPI-MEKAR (FI: track ran slightly north of the airway)
Passing north of waypoint MEKAR (MEKAR at 6.5039N 96.4911E)
points.source: time: FI p7 via Gilbert PDF; position interpolated ~7 NM past MEKAR along N571 toward NILAM (MEKAR/NILAM from OpenNav)

points.label: Last primary radar fix, 10 NM past MEKAR on N571 toward NILAM (SIR interpretation; Lido-slide alternative: 6.871123N 97.354047E)
points.source: time: FI p7 via Gilbert PDF; position: Safety Investigation Report interpretation as computed by mh370search/radiantphysics (Iannello); alt: Wikipedia MH370 article
